_doc: Mock current YAML + a representative validation result. Used by /admin/config.
yaml_text:
# crawler.yml — sources to index
# Reload via Admin → Config or `flask config reload`

defaults:
  user_agent: shse/0.1
  timeout_s: 30
  recrawl_interval_h: 6
  max_depth: 4

targets:
  - name: Prometheus
    url: http://prometheus.lab.local:9090
    service_label: prometheus
    include_paths:
      - /docs
      - /graph
    exclude_paths:
      - /api/v1/query

  - name: Gitea
    url: http://gitea.lab.local:3000
    service_label: gitea
    auth:
      type: token
      env: GITEA_TOKEN
    include_paths:
      - /
    exclude_paths:
      - /attachments
      - /raw

  - name: Grafana
    url: http://grafana.lab.local:3000
    service_label: grafana
    auth:
      type: bearer
      env: GRAFANA_TOKEN
    recrawl_interval_h: 12

errors.message: auth.type='token' requires `env` to point to an existing env var (GITEA_TOKEN is unset)
Unknown key 'recrawl_interval_h' at this level — did you mean to put it under defaults?

warnings: Grafana has no exclude_paths — every dashboard JSON will be indexed (~12 MB).
